# cloudflareext_secrets_store (Resource)

Manages a Cloudflare Secrets Store. A store is a container for secrets that can be accessed by Cloudflare services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflareext_secrets_store" "example" {
  name = "my-secret-store"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the store. Cannot be changed after creation.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the store.
- `modified` (String) The last modification timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import cloudflareext_secrets_store.example <store_id>
```
